title: Visionaire Studio
description:
This is the free, fully featured Visionaire Studio version suitable for Beginners & learning, First prototypes, Demos, Smaller jam games, Tutorials and experiments (up to 25 scenes). It comes with a Freeware License, so you may distribute your projects freely as long as they are non-commercial.

Visionaire Studio is a powerful game engine primarily designed for 2D point and click games, however over the years its capabilities have expanded and you can practically make games of more genres:

• 2D/2.5D third person point & click adventure games.

• First person myst-like adventure games.

• Interactive visual novels.

• FMV point & click adventure games.

• Games with Strategy / Simulation/ RPG mechanics / elements.

• Platformer games (using Box2D and Ilios, the engine's custom C# like scripting language) - WIP

• Isometric style games

Key Features:• High-Quality Game Engine 
Used for many commercially successful games.

• Designed for Narrative Games 
Built specifically for point-and-click and story-driven experiences, Visionaire Studio simplifies the development of interactive storytelling.

• No Coding Required 
Use the visual scripting system to create complex interactions effortlessly. For advanced users, Lua scripting provides unlimited possibilities.

• Multi-Platform Export 
Deploy your game to Windows, MacOS, Linux, iOS, Android, HTML5, and even consoles like PlayStation, Xbox, and Nintendo Switch (with the appropriate license). 

• Built-in Dialogue & Inventory System 
Develop complex dialogues, branching choices, and inventory-based puzzles with native tools. 

• Integrated Effects 
Bring your game to life with built-in animation support, parallax effects, and shaders.

• Lightweight & Optimized for 2D 
Unlike bloated game engines, Visionaire is optimized for 2D performance, making it ideal for classic adventure games and modern indie storytelling. 

• Strong Developer Community 
Join a passionate community of adventure game creators and get support from experienced developers.
description_short: Visionaire Studio is a professional game engine designed specifically for the creation of 2D and point-and-click adventure games.
